name: Silly Sky
author: Poki
description: Silly Sky is a management game where you play as air traffic control to guide a fleet of diverse airplanes coming from all directions. March aircraft to color-coded runways and helipads, you need to schedule their movements carefully and avoid any potential crashes! As you progress, you will unlock a variety of maps, each presenting unique terrains and challenges —land amidst jungle storms, navigate clouded city skies, dodge desert mountains, or tackle tornado-filled farmlands. Every game is a new adventure with surprise aircraft arrivals, so buckle up for the sky-high fun! How to play Silly Sky? Use your mouse to drag and drop the airplanes! Who created Silly Sky? Silly Sky is created by Project GD. Play their other games on Poki: Village Builder ! How can I play Silly Sky for free? You can play Silly Sky for free on Poki. Can I play Silly Sky on mobile devices and desktop? Silly Sky can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
